mapper.select: SELECT s.subject_code AS subjectCode, s.subject_name AS subjectName, s.category_code AS categoryCode, c.category_name AS categoryName, s.balance_direction AS balanceDirection, COALESCE(b.period_debit, 0) AS periodDebit, COALESCE(b.period_credit, 0) AS periodCredit, COALESCE(b.year_debit, 0) AS yearDebit, COALESCE(b.year_credit, 0) AS yearCredit FROM gl_account_subject s INNER JOIN gl_account_category c ON s.category_code = c.category_code AND c.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN gl_balance b ON b.subject_code = s.subject_code AND b.period_code = CONCAT(#{year}, LPAD(#{period}, 2, '0')) WHERE s.deleted = 0 AND s.is_leaf = 1 AND s.category_code IN ('INCOME', 'COST', 'EXPENSE') ORDER BY s.category_code, s.subject_code

SELECT c.item_code AS itemCode, c.item_name AS itemName, c.direction AS direction, CASE WHEN CAST(SUBSTRING(c.item_code, 3) AS UNSIGNED) <= 7 THEN 'operating' WHEN CAST(SUBSTRING(c.item_code, 3) AS UNSIGNED) <= 10 THEN 'investing' ELSE 'financing' END AS flowGroup, COALESCE(j.amount, 0) AS amount FROM gl_cash_flow_item c LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUBSTRING_INDEX(j.summary, '|', 1) AS item_code, SUM(CASE WHEN j.trans_type = 'IN' THEN j.amount ELSE -j.amount END) AS amount FROM cash_journal j WHERE j.deleted = 0 AND j.status = 'POSTED' AND DATE_FORMAT(j.trans_date, '%Y%m') = CONCAT(#{year}, LPAD(#{period}, 2, '0')) AND j.summary LIKE 'CF%|%' GROUP BY SUBSTRING_INDEX(j.summary, '|', 1) ) j ON j.item_code = c.item_code WHERE c.deleted = 0 ORDER BY c.sort_order, c.item_code
